name: a-mind-for-numbers
description: Barbara Oakley's A Mind for Numbers — apply the science of effective learning using focused/diffuse modes, chunking, active recall, spaced repetition, and procrastination management to master math, science, and any technical subject
useCase: Helps anyone learn math, science, and technical subjects more effectively by understanding how the brain works — focused and diffuse thinking modes, chunking complex ideas, retrieval practice, defeating procrastination, and test-taking strategies.
knownRisks: The techniques require consistent practice — learning the principles alone won't change study habits
Individual learning differences (ADHD, learning disabilities) may need adaptations alongside these techniques
